Sparkling Multi-color Rhinestones: This car rearview mirror pendant is adorned with dazzling multi-color rhinestones, adding a brilliant and stylish touch to your car's interior. It captures attention and elevates the overall decor of your car.

Creative Handmade Gift: Each pendant is meticulously handcrafted, ensuring quality and uniqueness. This creative handmade gift makes a perfect present for friends, family, or car enthusiasts, expressing care and well wishes.

Adorable Fox Plush Fur Ball Pendant: The hanging pendant features an adorable fox plush fur ball, bringing a warm and cute ambiance to your car interior. Not only does it decorate your car space, but it also uplifts your mood with its delightful charm.

Minimalist Decorative Accessory: Designed with a minimalist approach, this pendant complements various car interior styles. It serves not only as a decorative piece but also as an expression of your personality and taste.

Easy Installation: We provide a user-friendly installation process, simply hanging the pendant on your car's rearview mirror. It won't cause any damage to your car and allows for easy replacement or adjustment as per your preference


Material: Rhinestones and Plush Fur + Crystal Chain
Size: Fox Head - 1.5 * 1.5 inches, Fur Ball Diameter - 3 inches, Crystal Chain - 7.8 inches, Total Length: Approximately 11.8 inches
Note: Before use, use a hairdryer to blow the fur ball to make it fluffy.

Description: Elevate your car's interior with our multi-color sparkling rhinestone car rearview mirror pendant. Handcrafted with care, this adorable pendant features a cute fox plush fur ball that brings warmth and charm to your car space. Not only does it serve as a decorative accessory, but it also reflects your personality and taste. With its minimalist design, it complements any car interior style. Installation is easy, and it won't cause any damage to your car. This pendant makes a perfect gift for friends, family, or car enthusiasts, expressing care and well wishes. Material: Rhinestones and Plush Fur + Crystal Chain. Size: Fox Head - 1.5 * 1.5 inches, Fur Ball Diameter - 3 inches, Crystal Chain - 7.8 inches, Total Length: Approximately 11.8 inches. Note: Before use, use a hairdryer to blow the fur ball to make it fluffy.

This car rear view mirror pendant draws inspiration from the angelic design, featuring elegant wing shapes that add a touch of mystery and beauty to your car interior.

Crafted with high-quality nylon material using 3D printing technology, this pendant ensures durability and flexibility, maintaining its pristine condition for a long time.

The lightweight design of this charm won't burden your car's rearview mirror, and its smooth surface prevents any scratches or damage to your glass.

More than just a car accessory, this angelic pendant can also serve as a protective talisman, symbolizing protection and blessings, bringing safety and good luck to your driving journey.

Easy to install, simply hang it on your car's rearview mirror, and it instantly adds a special ambiance to your car's interior space, making it a unique and thoughtful gift choice


Crafted with high-quality nylon material and measuring 2.7*2 inches

Title: "Elegant Angel Wings Car Rear View Mirror Pendant - Durable Nylon Car Accessory for Protection and Good Luck"

Description: Add a touch of mystery and beauty to your car interior with our elegant angel wings car rear view mirror pendant. Crafted with high-quality nylon material using advanced 3D printing technology, this pendant ensures durability and flexibility, maintaining its pristine condition for a long time. Its lightweight design won't burden your rearview mirror, and its smooth surface prevents any scratches or damage. This pendant goes beyond being a car accessory - it also serves as a protective talisman, symbolizing protection and blessings, bringing safety and good luck to your driving journey. Easy installation allows you to hang it on your rearview mirror, instantly adding a special ambiance to your car. It also makes a unique and thoughtful gift choice.

Luxurious and Durable Texture: Crafted from high-quality cloud brocade silk, this purse boasts a dense and substantial texture that exudes luxury and durability. Its tightly woven threads ensure longevity and provide a sense of opulence.

Smooth and Flawless Surface: The surface of this purse is exquisitely smooth and flawless, reflecting the high craftsmanship that goes into its creation. The polished finish enhances its overall elegance, making it an ideal choice for formal events.

Versatile and Chic: With its charming cloud brocade design and vibrant colors, this silk purse effortlessly complements various outfits and styles. Whether attending weddings, evening parties, or special occasions, it adds a chic and sophisticated touch to any ensemble.
